prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-AO6MMSSBBSS-6MM-CHRM Product Type: AIR_GUN_PROJECTILE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 6mm Sling Shot Ball Bearings Steel 50 Piece Set Description: Hit your intended targets while out in the wilderness with the 50pc ASR Outdoor 6mm Slingshot Ball Bearings.

This set of steel ball bearings are designed for long distance shots while hiking, camping, hunting or backpacking. This pack comes with 50 balls, so you'll be able to practice on a number of different targets. Up your sling shot skills and grab a few of these ball bearing packs. Search Terms: metal sling shot ball bearings 6mm Features: - ASR Outdoor Sling Shot Ball Bearings - 50 Piece Set - Size: 6mm - Material: Steel - Designed for Long Distance Shots - Practice Target Practice === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 50-pc 6mm Steel Slingshot Ball Bearings

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 50-pk 6mm Steel Sling Shot Ball Bearings

anthropic.title_differentiation: 50 Piece Set, 6Mm Steel, Long Distance Shots, Hunting And Target Practice, Wilderness Ready

openai.title_differentiation: 50 Piece Set, Steel Construction, 6Mm Size, Long Distance Shots, Target Practice, Hiking Camping Hunting Backpacking
